scenarioName: Fail local verification when tests pass but report is contaminated

boundedContext.featureGherkin:
Scenario: Fail local verification when tests pass but report is contaminated
    Given all unit tests pass
    And the generated report verdict is `DOMAIN BODY CONTAMINATED`
    When the developer runs the local verification command
    Then the command should fail
    And the status should say:
      """
      tests pass, report truth gate fails
      """
    And the output should show:
      | field |
      | report verdict |
      | coverage |
      | silent local methods |
      | anonymous executable methods |
      | top finding codes |
      | top finding paths |
    And no local command should emit a promotion-ready or clean claim.
acceptanceCriteria: And the generated report verdict is `DOMAIN BODY CONTAMINATED`
And no local command should emit a promotion-ready or clean claim.
seedDataRules: seed data must be synthetic unless fixture data is explicitly allowed
seed data writes must stay inside allowed seed data paths
forbiddenActions: use secrets or personal data in seed data
mark this LLM run as QA passed
boundedContext.passFailReportingExpectations: report user-visible observations and link every pass or fail claim to evidence
